{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.5": 3, "R1.6": 4, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The critique identifies a structural issue (forward reference to results) and suggests a reorder, but doesn't propose a complete section plan.",
    "R1.6": "The critique provides specific suggestions for improving prose clarity and flow, indicating a careful copy-edit pass is needed.",
    "RX.1": "No explicit uncertainty disclosure is present in the output. It assumes all recommendations are equally confident.",
    "RX.3": "The critique acknowledges potential scope drift (e.g., 'the section makes no citations at all') but doesn't definitively state whether the output covers exactly the requested dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The critique flags potential for harm (e.g., unsupported claims) but doesn't identify any new errors or harmful content introduced by the agent.",
    "RX.5": "No mention of source tracing or provenance is made in the critique."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.5": 0.9, "R1.6": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.7, "RX.4": 0.8, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The critique identifies a structural issue (forward reference to results) and suggests a reorder, but doesn't propose a complete section plan.
rationale.R1.6: The critique provides specific suggestions for improving prose clarity and flow, indicating a careful copy-edit pass is needed.
rationale.RX.1: No explicit uncertainty disclosure is present in the output. It assumes all recommendations are equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: The critique acknowledges potential scope drift (e.g., 'the section makes no citations at all') but doesn't definitively state whether the output covers exactly the requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The critique flags potential for harm (e.g., unsupported claims) but doesn't identify any new errors or harmful content introduced by the agent.
rationale.RX.5: No mention of source tracing or provenance is made in the critique.
